title: Tinkering Wonders
description: A modpack based around magic and automation using the mods Malum and Embers Rekindled
body:
![Tinkering Wonders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8b00b137d08bb016da1beb247604996cf772269_0.webp)
### Overview
**Tinkering Wonders** is a forge modpack for version 1.20.1 based around magic and automation using with the mods Malum and Embers Rekindled as its core. Ad Astra is the mode of interest for the late game.

This modpack contains most of the modern QOL mods, such as EMI, Mouse Tweaks and Xaero's Minimap, as well as some optimization mods. Tinkering Wonders was designed around playing with friends, so Essential is also included.

Tinkering Wonders is still being updated regularly, fixing mods incompatibilities and adding new content!

### Core Mods
- [Embers Rekindled](https://modrinth.com/mod/embers) - dwarven themed magic and technology/automation mod with a lot of unique mechanics
- [Malum](https://modrinth.com/mod/malum) - an interesting magic mod centered around soul manipulations
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) - adds space travels (because space travel is magic in itself)

### Adventure Mods
- [Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-mod) adds rare unusual artifacts with various effects and the ability to upgrade them
- [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology) adds various ruins and dig sites along with fossils, new archeology related mechanics with rare useful rewards
- [Stellarity](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity) completely overhaules the End dimention, adding new biomes, mobs and loot

### Supplementary Mods
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) along with [End's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-delight), [Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight), [Miner's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight) and [Vegan Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegan-delight) to diversify the cooking process with various new dishes with unique buffs
- [[Let's Do] Candlelight](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-candlelight) and [[Let's Do] HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews) add some beautiful elements of cookware for making dinners and brewing tea
